name: cosmiclens-lab
description: Browser-native gravitational lensing laboratory with TypeScript physics and Python validation.

scripts.build: npm --workspace @cosmiclens/physics-core run build && npm --workspace @cosmiclens/schema run build && npm --workspace @cosmiclens/render-webgpu run build && npm --workspace @cosmiclens/render-webgl run build && npm --workspace @cosmiclens/web run build
scripts.framegrid:diagnostics: PYTHONPATH=python python -m cosmiclens_validate.framegrid examples/textbook/point-mass-ring.json framegrid-diagnostics.csv --frames 18 --mode einstein-radius-pulse

author: Biswajit Jana
